content: Patch handleBatchBackground to detect potential_duplicate and surface as interactive card instead of silent save
Update DuplicateConfirmDialog onConfirm to actually save batch-origin cards (not just stamp confirmed flag)
Update bgBatch counter to track pendingDuplicates and adjust final-toast nav logic
Add i18n strings for pending-duplicates state (en.json minimum, with defaultValue fallback for other locales)
Frontend smoke test via screenshot tool: confirm /closet/add still renders cleanly with no new runtime errors
